# Utagba-Ogbe Technical College

Utagba-Ogbe Technical College provides practical, career-focused technical education in Utagba-Ogbe, Delta State, Nigeria.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/): College overview, programmes and admissions information.
- [About](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/about): History, mission, values and training infrastructure.
- [Courses](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses): Available NTC and NBC technical programmes.
- [Admissions](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/admissions): Admission requirements and application guidance.
- [Contact](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/contact): Contact details and enquiry form.

## Programme information

- [Motor Vehicle Mechanic Works](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/motor-vehicle-mechanic-works)
- [Electrical Maintenance and Installation](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/electrical-maintenance-installation)
- [Fabrication and Welding](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/fabrication-and-welding)
- [Mechanical Engineering and Craft Practice](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/mechanical-engineering-craft-practice)
- [Plumbing and Pipefitting](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/plumbing-and-pipefitting)
- [Bricklaying, Blocklaying and Concreting](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/bricklaying-blocklaying-concreting)
- [Furniture Making](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/furniture-making)
- [Carpentry and Joinery](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/carpentry-and-joinery)
- [Air Conditioning and Refrigeration](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/air-conditioning-refrigeration)
- [Tiling and Interlocking](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/tiling-interlocking)
- [Painting and Decorations](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/painting-and-decorations)
- [NBC Business Studies](https://utagbatechnicalcollege.com.ng/courses/nbc-business-studies)
